args.notes: Portal clinical question from Jordan Kim via parent portal. Hi, is it normal that my 4-year-old Ava still can't say her R sounds? Should I be worried, or should we wait until kindergarten? I would appreciate advice before booking anything. Clinician should respond; do not provide clinical advice in automated reply.
args.title: Clinical question: Ava

args.body: Thank you for your message about Ava's speech sounds. We cannot provide clinical advice over the portal, but an intake coordinator will reach out to discuss screening options and next steps.
